name: memU Memory Plugin
description: OpenClaw memory plugin powered by memU SDK

embedding.description: Embedding model configuration for vector search

language.description: Output language for memory summaries. Options: 'auto' (follow input), 'zh' (Chinese), 'en' (English), or any language name.

dataDir.description: Directory for memU database and files

includeDefaultPaths.description: If true, ingest OpenClaw workspace root *.md and workspace/memory/*.md by default.

extraPaths.description: Extra directories/files to ingest Markdown from.

filterScheduledSystemMessages.description: Filter large system-injected scheduled payloads before conversion.

scheduledSystemMode.description: How to handle scheduled system payloads: event (compact marker), drop, keep.

scheduledSystemMinChars.description: Minimum message length to classify as scheduled payload.

mode.description: Retrieval mode. fast: vector-only. full: progressive retrieval with LLM checks.

contextMessages.description: Number of recent chat messages for retrieval context (mode=full).

defaultCategoryQuota.description: Default category result quota for memory_search.

defaultItemQuota.description: Default item result quota for memory_search.

outputMode.description: Tool output mode. compact: minimal fields. full: full JSON envelope.

debounceSeconds.description: Debounce interval for file change detection.

idleFlushSeconds.description: Idle time before flushing staged session tail.

rateLimitBackoffSeconds.description: Base backoff time on rate limit errors.

rateLimitBackoffMaxSeconds.description: Maximum backoff time on rate limit errors.
